activity_1_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වචන නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_1_d.text:

ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

content.sentence_text: Knurli'ng' was applied to the shaft surface to improve grip and prevent slippage during operation.
The copper pipes were joined by brazi'ng' to ensure a strong and leak-resistant connection.
Vibration dampi'ng' was incorporated into the machine base to enhance stability and reduce mechanical stress.
The workpiece was secured against the a'ng'le plate to maintain precise alignment during milling.

example.text:
Listen to the model dialogues.
ආදර්ශ සංවාදවලට සවන් දෙන්න.
மாதிரி உரையாடல்களை கேளுங்கள்.

activity_2_a.text:
Match the words with the pictures.
පින්තූර සමඟ වචන ගලපන්න.
சொற்களைப் படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_2_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.

ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

activity_2_e.text:
Read the answer and use the pause to ask the correct question. Then compare your response with the model question.
 පිළිතුර කියවා නිවැරදි ප්‍රශ්නය ඇසීමට විරාමය භාවිතා කරන්න. ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර ආදර්ශ පිළිතුර සමඟ සසඳන්න.
 பதிலைக் கவனமாக வாசித்து, இடைவெளியில் சரியான கேள்வியை கேளுங்கள். பின்னர் உங்கள் கேள்வியை மாதிரி கேள்வியுடன் ஒப்பிடவும்.

example_dialogues.text_a: Where should I leave the safety checklist?
example_dialogues.text_b: Leave it on the supervisor’s desk, next to the inspection file.

example_dialogues.text_a: Is there a calibrated measuring device anywhere in the workshop?
example_dialogues.text_b: No, there isn’t. In fact, there aren’t any calibrated measuring devices in the workshop at the moment.

example_dialogues.text_a: Do you complete maintenance reports on Monday mornings?
example_dialogues.text_b: No, I don’t. But I complete maintenance reports on Monday evenings. I have more time to focus on documentation in the evenings than in the mornings.

dialogues.text_a: Does she usually inspect the equipment on Friday afternoons?
dialogues.text_b: No, she rarely inspects the equipment on Friday afternoons. She usually inspects it on Tuesday mornings.

dialogues.text_a: Why are you testing the backup system manually?
dialogues.text_b: I am testing it manually because the automated system is offline. I always test it manually when the automated system is unavailable.

dialogues.text_a: Can he assist us with the final inspection tomorrow afternoon?
dialogues.text_b: I’m afraid he can’t. He has to attend a compliance meeting tomorrow afternoon, and no replacement has been assigned.

dialogues.text_a: What do you usually do during the weekend?
dialogues.text_b: I like to review new technical manuals. I normally analyse one manual every Saturday, but this weekend I am going to review three updated manuals.

dialogues.text_a: Sir, may I leave thirty minutes earlier today? I have severe back pain.
dialogues.text_c: I strained it while lifting a freezer.

dialogues.text_a: Can you operate the digital monitoring system independently?
dialogues.text_b: Yes, I can. I regularly operate the digital monitoring system in my current role. In fact, this is my primary responsibility on Wednesdays.

activity_a.text:
Choose the correct answer.
 නිවැරදි පිළිතුර තෝරන්න.
 சரியான பதிலைத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.

activity_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

content.sentence: The milling machine _____ fully operational today.
The technician _____ a defect in the bearing housing yesterday.
The torque wrench is placed _____ the spanner set and the grease gun on the bench.
He usually _____ the shaft alignment, but he _____ it right now.
There _____ always a vibration noise during machine overload.
There _____ five replacement gears stored in the tool cabinet.
The mechanic _____ checks lubrication levels before starting the engine.
You _____ measure the shaft diameter using a micrometer.
I _____ tighten the coupling bolts before operating the motor.
We _____ replace the worn-out gasket tomorrow.
_____ the mechanics _____ all the maintenance tasks yesterday?
The operator _____ the coolant level now to prevent overheating.
_____ any loose bolts on the machine frame?
_____ he _____ the inspection log every evening?
He _____ his safety goggles before operating the grinder every day.

activity_b.text: The milling machine is fully operational today.
The technician found a defect in the bearing housing yesterday.
The torque wrench is placed between the spanner set and the grease gun on the bench.
He usually adjusts the shaft alignment, but he is inspecting it right now.
There is always a vibration noise during machine overload.
There are five replacement gears stored in the tool cabinet.
The mechanic usually checks lubrication levels before starting the engine.
You can measure the shaft diameter using a micrometer.
I have to tighten the coupling bolts before operating the motor.
We are going to replace the worn-out gasket tomorrow.
Did the mechanics complete all the maintenance tasks yesterday?
The operator is checking the coolant level now to prevent overheating.
Are there any loose bolts on the machine frame?
Does he write the inspection log every evening?
He wears his safety goggles before operating the grinder every day.

activity_a.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_b.text:
Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

activity_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

Questions.question: What does Kanthi’s research about the company suggest?
Questions.answer: She prepares in advance and shows genuine interest.
options: She is mainly interested in salary and benefits.
She prepares in advance and shows genuine interest.
She expects detailed supervision at all times.

Questions.question: Why does Kanthi find Mechanical Technology satisfying?
Questions.answer: She enjoys varied mechanical processes and results.
options: She prefers doing simple repetitive tasks.
She enjoys varied mechanical processes and results.

Questions.question: What can be inferred about Kanthi’s approach to safety?
Questions.answer: She treats safety as part of everyday work.
options: She follows safety rules only when monitored.
She depends entirely on others for safety.
She treats safety as part of everyday work.

Questions.question: How does Kanthi respond to technological changes?
Questions.answer: She accepts the need for continuous learning.
options: She accepts the need for continuous learning.
She believes older machines are always better.

Questions.question: What does Kanthi’s attitude toward feedback show?
Questions.answer: She uses feedback to improve and collaborate better.
options: She uses feedback to improve and collaborate better.

activity_b.text: I enjoy working with machines and understanding how mechanical systems operate.
It is satisfying to see components such as shafts, bearings, and couplings assembled accurately.
Each task is different, whether it involves operating a lathe, inspecting a gearbox, or aligning a motor.
I also value teamwork in the workshop because cooperation improves efficiency and safety.
I am confident in measuring components with a vernier caliper and micrometer, operating a drilling machine, and performing basic lathe operations.
I have also assisted with preventive maintenance, lubrication, belt tension adjustment, and replacing worn parts.
I always follow workshop safety procedures.
I wear appropriate personal protective equipment, check machine guards before operation, and ensure tools are properly secured.
I also keep the workspace clean and report unusual vibration or noise immediately.
Mechanical technology continues to develop, so I understand the importance of learning new systems.
I can follow updated operating procedures and observe experienced technicians carefully.
I practise new machining techniques to improve accuracy and efficiency.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට මෙම පියවර ඔබට උපකාරී වනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
Watch the video 2 times.

வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.

Google පරිවර්තකය භාවිතයෙන් නව වචන ඉගෙන ගන්න.
கூகுள் ட்ரான்ஸ்லேட் பயன்படுத்தி புதிய சொற்களைக் கற்றுக்கொள்ளுங்கள்.
